TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Niger, title = Niger, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Niger} }

S.FORM: Niger hya' ga cyux maki' tay 16 00 N, 8 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1.267 million sq km (maki' tay 22ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,266,700 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 300 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 18,638,600. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 35.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 1%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 63.90%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Niamey. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mahamadou Issoufou, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Niger hya' ga cyux maki' tay 16 00 N, 8 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1.267 million sq km (maki' tay 22ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,266,700 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 300 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 18,638,600. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 35.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 1%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 63.90%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Niamey. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mahamadou Issoufou, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ni…£er ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *.*** million s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *,***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a niamej. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mańßama*ou is~…ēs~…ēou*ou, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
